title: The Magic Toy Shop 20 Piece Kids Tool Set with Carrying Case - Toy Tool Kit with Electric Drill, Hammer & Screwdriver, Light & Sound, Educational Role Play - Children's Pretend Play & Early Learning
features: COMPLETE 20-PIECE TOOL SET: Includes toy drill, screwdriver, wrench, spanner, nuts, bolts, wood planks, and more. This toy tool kit gives children everything they need to explore basic construction and tool use.

REALISTIC DRILL ACTION: Electric drill toy set for kids features rotating motion, lights, and sound. Drill moves clockwise and counter-clockwise, offering engaging and lifelike play for aspiring young builders.

EDUCATIONAL & SKILL-BUILDING: Encourages hand-eye coordination, motor skills, problem-solving, and early engineering concepts. Great for imaginative building games and enhancing creativity with kids construction toys.

PERFECT GIFT FOR KIDS: Children's tool set comes in a sturdy tool case, making it easy to carry and store. A fun and thoughtful gift for birthdays, Christmas, or preschool pretend play for ages 3 and up. Ideal tool kit for kids.

SPECIFICATIONS: Item Dimensions: Width: 29.5 cm, Depth: 7.5 cm, Height: 27 cm / Package Dimensions: Height: 27 cm, Width: 30 cm, Depth: 7.5 cm / Package Weight: 740 g / Material: Plastic / Color: Yellow / Recommended Age: 3 years and over / Set Includes: 1x Drill, 1x Hammer, 1x Screwdriver with Phillips Head, 1x Flat Head for Screwdriver, 1x Wrench, 1x Spanner, 1x Driver Bit, 3x Screws, 3x Nuts, 3x Brown Wooden Planks with Holes, 2x Peg Anchors, 1x Ruler, 1x Tool Case
